title: STR Triage Pack 1 — Kitchen Gadgets Category
description: A search term report dataset for a kitchen gadgets seller with mixed performance. Contains 20 search terms requiring triage decisions ranging from obvious negations to optimization opportunities.

productContext.title: Premium Garlic Press - Stainless Steel Mincer with Easy Squeeze Handle

searchTerms.reasoning: High volume term with good CTR but ACoS is 62.5% — way above the 25% target. The term converts well (8.3% CVR) so it's worth keeping, but the bid needs to come down significantly. Lower bid to ~$0.65 to bring ACoS closer to target.

Strong CTR (5.3%) and decent conversion (10.8% CVR) but ACoS at 40.8% is still above target. This is a high-potential term — reduce bid moderately to ~$0.80 to improve efficiency while maintaining volume.
Good CTR and conversion but ACoS at 46% is high. Reduce bid to ~$0.70 to bring this toward profitability while keeping the volume since it's a relevant term.
Close to target ACoS (31% vs 25% target). Small bid reduction to ~$0.75 should bring this into the profitable zone. Good conversion rate at 11.6%.
Excellent performance! ACoS of 23.7% is below the 25% target, strong CTR (6%), good conversion (13.5%). This is a star keyword — maintain current bid and monitor.
Slightly above target ACoS (31.1%) but strong CTR and conversion. The 'easy clean' angle is a key differentiator for this product. Keep current bid — volume may grow and improve efficiency.

Terrible performance: ACoS of 424.5% means you're spending $4.25 for every $1 of sales. Very low CTR (1.4%) shows poor relevance. The term 'kitchen gadgets' is too broad and attracts unqualified traffic. Add as exact negative keyword immediately.

Even worse than 'kitchen gadgets' — 522.8% ACoS with minimal conversion. The term 'cooking tools' is far too broad and attracts every type of cookware shopper. Add as phrase negative to block this and similar variations.
Good CTR (5%) and conversion (13.3%) but ACoS at 45% is too high. This is a high-intent term — reduce bid to ~$0.85 to make it profitable while keeping the relevant traffic.
594.2% ACoS — this is a money pit. Despite decent CTR, shoppers searching for 'onion chopper' are not buying your garlic press. Add as exact negative keyword.
156% ACoS — searchers looking for a garlic peeler want a different product. Low conversion (3.3%) confirms poor product-market fit for this term. Add as exact negative.

Excellent! 23.3% ACoS (below target), strong CTR (5.95%), and 12% conversion. 'Best' queries indicate high purchase intent. Maintain or slightly increase bid to capture more of this high-value traffic.

Outstanding! 16.8% ACoS and 5.95x ROAS. This is a niche but highly converting term. Your product's 'easy squeeze handle' perfectly matches this need. Keep and consider increasing bid slightly to capture more impressions.

641% ACoS with terrible CTR (0.59%) and conversion (1.1%). 'Vegetable chopper' is completely irrelevant to a garlic press. Add as phrase negative to block this and variations like 'vegetable chopper dicer'.
Star keyword! 19.7% ACoS, 6.2% CTR, 12.2% CVR, and 5.08x ROAS. This is performing well below your ACoS target. Consider increasing the bid to capture more volume on this high-converting exact match.
499% ACoS — 'food press' is too vague and attracts irrelevant traffic (people looking for tortilla presses, fruit presses, etc.). Low CTR (1.15%) confirms poor relevance. Add as exact negative.
Zero conversions from 65 clicks. Searchers looking for a 'silicone roller' garlic peeler want a completely different product type. Add as exact negative keyword to stop wasting spend.
Moderate performance — 55.3% ACoS is above target but 8% CVR shows the term has potential. Reduce bid to ~$0.55 to bring ACoS closer to 25% while maintaining the converting traffic.
Right at the ACoS target (25.6%) with good CTR and conversion. 'Gift' intent searches can be seasonal goldmines. Keep current bid and monitor, especially around holidays.
23.2% ACoS — below target! High CTR (5.27%), good conversion (12.1%), and strong ROAS (4.31x). Dual-use queries (garlic + ginger) are perfect for this product. Keep and potentially increase bid.
